Operation 'getBanksList' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is missing entirely. Added context about PSE payment method, what data is returned, and clarified that only merchant authentication is needed. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to invoke it for PSE payment processing.

data.current_summary: Get list of available banks for PSE transfers
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of banks available for PSE (Pagos Seguros en Línea) bank transfer payments in the merchant's configured country. Returns a list of bank objects containing bank codes and names required for PSE payment method selection. No request parameters beyond merchant authentication are required.
data.reasoning: Description is missing entirely. Added context about PSE payment method, what data is returned, and clarified that only merchant authentication is needed. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and when to invoke it for PSE payment processing.

message: Operation 'ping' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is missing. Added context about authentication verification, use case (health checks), and expected response behavior. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what success/failure indicates.

data.current_summary: Ping the API to verify connectivity
data.description_suggestion: Verifies API connectivity and merchant authentication credentials. Sends a simple health check request to confirm the API is operational and the merchant account is accessible. Returns a success response if the connection and authentication are valid. Useful for pre-flight checks before processing payments.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added context about authentication verification, use case (health checks), and expected response behavior. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what success/failure indicates.

message: Operation 'queryByOrderId' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is missing. Added details about what information is returned (order status, transaction details, payment method), required input (order ID), and use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when to query orders and what data they'll receive.

data.current_summary: Query order details by order ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific order using its order ID. Returns the order status, transaction details, payment method used, and associated transaction responses. Requires the merchant's order ID as input. Useful for verifying payment status and retrieving transaction history.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added details about what information is returned (order status, transaction details, payment method), required input (order ID), and use cases. This enables AI agents to understand when to query orders and what data they'll receive.

message: Operation 'queryByTransactionId' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is missing. Added context about what constitutes the transaction ID (PayU-assigned), what data is returned, and practical use cases. This helps AI agents distinguish between transaction and order queries and understand when each is appropriate.

data.current_summary: Query transaction details by transaction ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed transaction information using the PayU-assigned transaction ID. Returns transaction status, response codes, authorization details, and associated order information. Requires the transaction ID from the original payment response. Useful for reconciliation and verifying payment processing results.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added context about what constitutes the transaction ID (PayU-assigned), what data is returned, and practical use cases. This helps AI agents distinguish between transaction and order queries and understand when each is appropriate.

message: Operation 'queryByReferenceCode' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is missing. Added clarification that reference code is merchant-defined (distinguishing it from PayU's transaction ID), what data is returned, and the use case. This helps AI agents understand the difference between the three query operations and when to use each one.

data.current_summary: Query order details by reference code
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves order information using the merchant-defined reference code. Returns the order status, associated transactions, and payment details for all transactions linked to the reference code. Requires the reference code provided during payment submission. Useful for looking up orders by merchant-specific identifiers.
data.reasoning: Description is missing. Added clarification that reference code is merchant-defined (distinguishing it from PayU's transaction ID), what data is returned, and the use case. This helps AI agents understand the difference between the three query operations and when to use each one.
